goal: Update FALLBACK_BACK_PACK default from retired meow-v2 pack to moonmallow
done: Changed FALLBACK_BACK_PACK constant in js/asset-resolver.js from 'meow-v2' to 'moonmallow'; sole literal in file
symptom: Asset resolver falling back to retired meow-v2 pack when active deck back lookup misses
root_cause: Hardcoded fallback constant still pointed at retired pack id
fix: One-line literal change to 'moonmallow' (used by FALLBACK_BACK_PACK on line 4, consumed at line 149)
notes: Re-authorized one-time edit to off-limits file per session instructions. Surgical scope: constant value only; no logic, no other files. Canonical-source only — www/ and ios/ mirrors deferred to user's cp + cap sync workflow.

goal: Rebuild contextual bottom-nav center button with today/continue/share/draw states
done: State machine in js/bottom-nav.js detects body[data-page] + localStorage daily-drawn signal + continue-button disabled state; MutationObserver re-renders on data-page/data-reading-mode/data-daily-phase + continue-button[disabled] changes; nav dispatches meow:request-share + meow:request-continue events, decoupled listeners in js/reading.js (calls openSharePage) and js/main.js (clicks first present-and-enabled continue button); renderDaily made continueBtn-null tolerant; CSS adds share gradient, continue gold, button-chrome reset, and disabled dim
symptom: Static Draw-only center button — no context-aware affordance for in-progress selection, share, or 'view today' states
root_cause: Original contextual-navbar feature (commit 6455317 on feat/capacitor-ios-wrap) was never merged to main
fix: Fresh rebuild informed by 6455317 patterns, extended with today state (via localStorage key 'meowtarot.daily.cardOfTheDay') and continue-ready/continue-disabled split. Double-bind guards on window._meowNavListenerBound / _meowContinueListenerBound / _meowShareListenerBound
notes: Canonical-source only — www/ and ios/ mirrors deferred to user's cp + cap sync workflow. Spec-confirmed before build: continue is one state with disabled flag; today state uses both localStorage drawn-check and pathname /today/* detection; question-draw page (data-page='question-draw') is treated as a continue context.
